response.step_by_step_log: Identified the song title via on-screen text "君に会いたい時だって". Searched for the lyrics to confirm the song name and original source. The song is "そこにあるかも知れない・・・" from Daito Music (Yoshimune Pachislot). Used the search result to obtain the original Japanese lyrics and provided an English translation based on the lyrical content.
response.global_summary: The video opens with a 2-minute 3D animation skit before transition to a live concert performance by the VTuber Usada Pekora. The performance segment features a single cover song from the Japanese Pachislot machine "Yoshimune".

scenes.description: Intro card and 3D animation skit with Usada Pekora and rabbit characters.
Usada Pekora performs the song "Soko ni Aru Kamo Shirenai..." on stage.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
君に会いたい時だって
どこか会えない気持ちがある
だけど本当の優しさが
そこにあるかもしれない
人混みに揺られてる
どこかに宛があるわけじゃない
一人きり歩いても
何か解決することじゃない
自分が本当望んでる
気持ちはきっと
これから二人で
歩いて行くことさ
...,song_title:
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Even when I want to see you, there are times I feel I cannot meet you
But perhaps true kindness is there
Being swayed by the crowd
It's not that I have a destination somewhere
Even if I walk all alone
It's not that it solves anything
The feelings I am truly hoping for
Are, for sure, from here on
We will walk together
That is what I'm going to do...,original_language:
